Interface ICoordinateXform2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control a coordinate (projection) transform.

[Guid("71ABCACF-B2AC-4074-A99B-F6AE0264F293")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ICoordinateXform2 : ICoordinateXform, IGeodataXform
